title: ocotea corymbosa
intro: Ocotea corymbosa, also known as Cananga or Wild Tangerine, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its essential oil, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Ocotea corymbosa have been associated with various health benefits, including stress relief, improved sleep, and immune system support. Ocotea corymbosa is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oil, capsules, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
